title: Lemonade, Inc. (LMND) Earnings Dates & Report
text: Lemonade Inc LMND earnings calendar and reports. Company reports earnings quarterly typically late January/early February (Q4), late April/early May (Q1), late July/early August (Q2), late October/early November (Q3). 2024 earnings highlights: Q1 $119.1M revenue (25% growth), Q2 $122M revenue (17% growth), Q3 $137M revenue (19% growth), Q4 $149M revenue (29% growth). 2025 earnings highlights: Q1 2025 showed continued growth momentum with in-force premium reaching $1.16B (30% growth). 2026 earnings highlights: Q1 2026 revenue $258M (71% growth), in-force premium $1.33B (32% growth). Key metrics tracked: In-force premium growth (target 30%+ annually), gross loss ratio improvement (trending toward 60%), customer count growth, net loss narrowing, adjusted EBITDA progress. Analyst expectations: Revenue growth 60%+ through 2026, EBITDA positive Q4 2026, GAAP profitability 2027. Consensus estimates: EPS -$0.58 next quarter, revenue $251.5M.
